howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Four simple steps to master liquidity provision

step1.title: Configure Treasury
step1.description: Initialize virtual capital allocation (default $10,000) for position simulation.

step2.title: Select Pool Pairs
step2.description: Choose liquidity pools (ETH/USDC, BTC/USDC, SOL/USDC) with live market pricing.

step3.title: Deploy Capital
step3.description: Distribute treasury allocation across pools with precision controls and price range selection.

step4.title: Monitor & Analyze
step4.description: Track fee accrual, impermanent loss exposure, and APR performance in real-time.

disclaimer.title: Educational Simulation Only
disclaimer.description: This platform employs simplified mathematical models for educational demonstration. Real-world DeFi returns depend on market volatility, trading volume, gas costs, and numerous external factors.
disclaimer.footer: Not financial advice. Always conduct independent research before deploying capital.

flashLoan.title: Flash Loan Simulator
flashLoan.subtitle: Learn how flash loans work through interactive step-by-step simulations

banner.title: What are Flash Loans?
banner.description1: Flash loans are uncollateralized loans that must be borrowed and repaid within the same transaction. If you cannot repay, the entire transaction reverts - like it never happened!
banner.description2: Use cases: Arbitrage, Liquidations, Collateral Swaps • Fee: {{fee}}% • Risk: Only gas fees if transaction fails

arbitrage.title: Arbitrage
arbitrage.description: Buy low on DEX A, sell high on DEX B

quickTips.title: Quick Tips
quickTips.tip1: Start with small allocations to understand the mechanics
quickTips.tip2: Monitor price changes to see how they affect IL
quickTips.tip3: Compare different pool allocations to optimize returns
quickTips.tip4: Fees accumulate over time - longer simulations show more impact
quickTips.tip5: Diversification across pools can reduce overall risk
